creator: nico@lifeisabug.com
text:
C(OPT)FLAGS and stuff like that is all default. Unfortunately I can't reboot
the server to try GENERIC but have a look at the diff of the custom kernel
config to the GENERIC one, if that helps: http://sprunge.us/GgFV
I also just noticed that if htop is running for 20sec, the memory values
change to correct (at least reasonable) ones.
